term: Floating Like Feathers on a Breeze
englishDefinitions: Moving very gently, lightly, and effortlessly, as if carried by the wind.
persianTranslation: مثل پر روی نسیم شناور بودن
خیلی سبک و آرام حرکت کردن
examples: The leaves were floating like feathers on a breeze.
Her scarf moved behind her, floating like feathers on a breeze.
The dancers crossed the stage, floating like feathers on a breeze.
